must_detect.matched_text: Data Processing Addendum and Privacy Notice between Siam Tamarind Holdings Public Company Limited (SET code: STHX) as Controller and Pinnara Legal & Finance Co., Ltd. as Processor for financing, employment, and cross-border matters.
Security and breach: encryption at rest/in transit, role-based access, and breach notification to STHX and, where applicable, PDPC without undue delay and where feasible within 72 hours.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Data Processing Addendum and Privacy Notice between Siam Tamarind Holdings Public Company Limited (SET code: STHX) as Controller and Pinnara Legal & Finance Co., Ltd. as Processor for financing, employment, and cross-border matters.

Blackout window: from quarter-end until 24 hours after financial results are disseminated via SETLink
